Notice And Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination Or To Hearing Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael F. Brown, Atty. for defendant and moving party: Navin Aggrawal
Michael Padway, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: D Adah Kinyany

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT NAVIN AGGRAWAL's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination, or in the alternative, To Hear Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination is denied as it seeks a second Independent Medical Examination as there is no good cause to reopen discovery. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
